hero.desc: Designers, gardeners, builders. We create inhabited outdoor spaces — carved from stone, written in water, validated by climate.

philosophie.img_caption: Every project begins beneath our feet — reading the soil, orientation, and rain that will not come.
philosophie.p1: We believe a garden is not a decoration. It is a place that breathes, that patinas, that resists — and that, with time, becomes more right than on the first day.
philosophie.p2: Mineral architecture, precise water management, endemic planting: three requirements, one signature. Ours.

expertise.intro: Our method borrows from the garden what it holds most precious: slowness. Four steps, conducted like an ascent — each validates the one before, each prepares the one after.

steps.title: Site study & analysis
steps.body: We walk. We listen. We measure. The project is first a map of the terrain.

steps.title: Architectural design
steps.body: The garden is drawn like a building: volumes, circulation, vanishing points, silences.

steps.title: Mineral & hydraulic mastery
steps.body: Water is sculpted. Stone is laid. Climate dictates the constraints — we transform them into a design statement.

steps.title: Planting & signed maintenance
steps.body: At the summit, the living. We accompany each garden over 5, 10, 20 years — that is where it takes its true form.

portfolio.desc: 5 hectares of living heritage at the heart of Fès. Full rehabilitation of Parc Mérinide Bab Lamer — 5,000 m² artificial lake, local flora, materials from Fès. Inaugurated in November 2025.

projects.title: Parc Mérinide Bab Lamer
projects.desc: Restoration and redesign of 5 hectares at the heart of Fès. 5,000 m² artificial lake, local flora, materials from Fès. Inaugurated in November 2025.

projects.title: Natural Pond 1,000 m²
projects.desc: 1,000 m² natural pond with biological filtration, aquatic plants, Japanese Koi carp and OASE aerators.

projects.title: Mérinide Park — Lake
projects.desc: 5,000 m² artificial lake at the heart of Parc Mérinide Bab Lamer. Natural filtration, endemic flora and landscaped banks.

resilience.desc: Droughts, salt winds, late frost. Designing a high-end garden today means imagining it for the climate of 2050 — not 1990. Our commitment is written into this.

pillars.d: 100% of plantings adapted to the local climate. No species dependent on continuous irrigation.
Smart drip irrigation, rainwater harvesting, vegetable mulching — sobriety by default.
A 3-year growth guarantee, with monitoring over 10. Living things require long timeframes.

contact.desc: First consultation offered. We review every enquiry within 72 hours and commit to a limited number of projects per year.
contact.form_message: A few words about your project
contact.success_body: Your enquiry has been received. We will get back to you within 72 hours, from the studio.

footer.quote: "A garden is never finished. It begins."
